events.event_description: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation at Monrovia were established when Commissioner and Consul General Abraham Hanson presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation at Monrovia were established on February 23, 1864, when American Commissioner and Consul General Abraham Hanson presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

events.event_description: The American Legation at Monrovia was elevated to Embassy status when Ambassador Edward R. Dudley presented his credentials to the Liberian government.

evidence.quote: The American Legation at Monrovia was elevated to Embassy status on May 6, 1949, when Ambassador Edward R. Dudley presented his credentials to the Liberian government.
